source_pr.title: *: Pass make race in the DDL test

symptoms: *: Pass make race in the DDL test
failure_signature: *: Pass make race in the DDL test
root_cause_explanation: The DDL tests were flaky under the race detector because DDL statements were executed from a goroutine using shared session/test helper state. This PR stabilizes it by executing the DDL in the goroutine via a separate session helper (`sessionExec`) instead of reusing the shared helper.
fix_pattern: Avoid sharing sessions/test helpers across goroutines; run async DDL via a dedicated session/connection to prevent -race data races.

evidence: evidence: *: Pass make race in the DDL test
